sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, session_uptime UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_table (id, session_uptime) VALUES (1, zookeeperSessionUptime());
UPDATE test_table SET session_uptime = zookeeperSessionUptime() WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, session_uptime, zookeeperSessionUptime() AS current_uptime FROM test_table;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table WHERE session_uptime > zookeeperSessionUptime();
